raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-directed commitment declaration that operationalizes behavioral intention and orients toward actionable implementation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "vague resolutions are inherently uncarryable",
    "small observable changes are reliably carryable by the speaker",
    "commitment to specificity increases follow-through probability",
    "the speaker possesses the capacity to discriminate between feasible and infeasible targets"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; the statement consistently privileges operationalizability and contrasts it with non-operationalizable alternatives without self-contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker can accurately identify genuinely small, observable behaviors whose cumulative effect addresses the clinical target, and environmental contingencies support repeated execution",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the designated 'small changes' are trivial, unrelated to the functional problem, or used to avoid higher-magnitude actions required for meaningful change"
}
